name: Rack of Lamb - Dgp
recipeInstructions:
1. Whisk all ingredients together until it forms a mayonnaise consistency.
2. Coat the Rack of Lamb (both sides) with the mixture.
3. Broil for 5 minutes on each side.
4. Turn the oven to 400 degrees and bake for 10 minutes for rare or 15 minutes for medium.
5. Remove from the oven and let the meat rest for 5 minutes before carving.
